name: Sesame Noodles #2
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Dried wheat noodles, linguine, or soba noodles
1 scallion, finely sliced on the diagonal
recipeInstructions:
From "Sundays at Moosewood Restaurant." Serves 4 to 6 as an appetizer or side dish.
1. In a blender or food processor, puree all the sauce ingredients until free of lumps.
2. Cook the noodles until tender and drain immediately.
3. Toss the cooked noodles with the prepared sauce.
4. Serve at room temperature, topped with mung bean sprouts, peanuts, and scallions.
Note: If you're not serving this soon after preparation, the noodles might clump together. Should this happen, stir in a little warm water and soy sauce just before serving.
